name: Quick Low-Fat Burritos
recipeIngredient: Grated low-fat Monterey Jack cheese or other reduced fat cheese variety
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm the tortilla in a microwave for about 30 seconds.
2. Top the warm tortilla with beans and rice.
3. Add cilantro pesto or salsa, shredded lettuce, and a sprinkle of grated low-fat cheese on top.
4. Roll up the tortilla tightly and serve.
